should_trigger.prompt: Promote this verified PrismSpec lesson into reusable project knowledge.
verify.md has Knowledge Candidates; turn the reusable ones into drafts.
Capture this repeated pitfall so future specs avoid it.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Fix this one-off typo in the implementation.
Store this secret token for future runs.
should_not_trigger.reason: Sensitive data must not be captured.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Write plan.md for the approved spec.

assertions: Captures only durable, sourced, non-secret knowledge.
Includes owner, verified_at, applies_to, source, and pressure scenario when relevant.
Leaves one-off implementation details in task evidence or verify.md.
